Frequently Asked Questions
1. CBI Apprentice Recruitment Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 12 June 2026.
2. CBI Apprentice Recruitment Exam Date?
The exam is likely to be held in the first week of July 2026 .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the CBI Apprentice Recruitment Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the CBI Apprentice Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. CBI Apprentice Recruitment Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. CBI Apprentice Recruitment Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 28 June 2026..
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 28 June 2026 .
7. How can I apply for CBI Apprentice Recruitment Exam?
Candidates can apply online through the official recruitment link available on SarkariResult.com (Since 2012) – Official Website of Sarkari Result®
